name: Agricultural Sciences
description: Building housing agricultural sciences programs with labs, classrooms, and faculty offices.

name: Ag Mechanics
description: Facility supporting agricultural mechanics instruction and hands-on training with farm equipment.

name: Ag Operations
description: Facilities supporting the operational side of Fresno State's working farm and agricultural programs.

name: Animal Science Pavilion
description: Pavilion supporting animal science instruction with livestock facilities and educational spaces.

name: Aquatics Center
description: Campus aquatics center with swimming pools for recreation, athletics, and kinesiology instruction.

name: Armenian Genocide Monument
description: Campus monument commemorating the Armenian Genocide, reflecting Fresno's significant Armenian-American community.

name: Conley Art Building
description: Art building named for Conley housing studios, galleries, and classrooms for fine arts and studio art programs.

name: Athletics Facilities
description: General athletics facilities complex supporting Fresno State Bulldogs sports programs.

name: Baker Hall
description: Academic hall providing classrooms and faculty offices for university programs.

name: Beef Cattle Unit
description: Farm unit housing beef cattle for animal science instruction and agricultural research programs.

name: Bennett Stadium
description: Campus baseball stadium named for Bennett hosting Fresno State Bulldogs baseball games.

name: Bicycle Parking Areas
description: Designated bicycle parking and rack locations distributed throughout the Fresno State campus.

name: Boiler / Utility Areas
description: Campus boiler and utility facilities providing energy and infrastructure services to university buildings.

name: Kennel Bookstore
description: Campus bookstore offering textbooks, course materials, Fresno State merchandise, and student supplies.

name: Leon S. Peters Business Building
description: Business building named for Leon S. Peters housing the Craig School of Business with classrooms and faculty offices.

name: Campus Pointe
description: Campus Pointe development providing retail, dining, and mixed-use spaces adjacent to the Fresno State campus.

name: Central Plant / Utilities
description: Campus central utility plant providing heating, cooling, and energy infrastructure for university buildings.

name: Chemistry / Science Buildings
description: Chemistry and science buildings with teaching labs, research facilities, and classrooms for chemistry and related sciences.

name: Child Development / Lab School
description: Child development center and laboratory school providing early childhood education and teacher preparation practicum sites.

name: Grosse Industrial Technology Building
description: Industrial technology building named for Grosse housing construction management, industrial technology, and engineering technology programs.

name: College of Health & Human Services
aliases: College of Health and Human Services
description: Building housing the College of Health and Human Services with classrooms and faculty offices for health programs.

name: Kremen School of Education & Human Development
aliases: Kremen School of Education & Human Development
description: Named for the Kremen family, this school houses education and human development programs with classrooms and research centers.

name: Creamery
description: On-campus creamery producing and selling award-winning dairy products including cheese and ice cream.

name: Downing Planetarium & Museum
description: Campus planetarium and museum named for Downing offering astronomy education, star shows, and science exhibits.

name: Duncan Athletic Facility
description: Athletics facility named for Duncan supporting Fresno State Bulldogs athletic programs with training and support spaces.

name: Engineering East
description: East engineering building with labs, classrooms, and faculty offices for Lyles College of Engineering programs.

name: Engineering West
description: West engineering building with labs, classrooms, and faculty offices for Lyles College of Engineering programs.

name: Donald E. Gumz Enology Building
description: Enology building named for Donald E. Gumz supporting viticulture and enology programs with winemaking labs and facilities.

name: Equestrian Center
description: Campus equestrian center with riding arenas and stables supporting equestrian sports and animal science programs.

name: Family Food Science
description: Building housing family and food science programs with teaching kitchens, labs, and research facilities.

name: Rue and Gwen Gibson Farm Market
aliases: Rue and Gwen Gibson Farm Market
description: On-campus farm market named for Rue and Gwen Gibson selling fresh produce, meats, and dairy from Fresno State's farms.

name: Feed / Food Processing Labs
description: Laboratory facilities for feed and food processing instruction supporting agricultural and food science programs.

name: Food Science
description: Building housing food science programs with processing labs, sensory evaluation rooms, and research facilities.

name: Football Practice Fields
description: Athletic practice fields dedicated to Fresno State Bulldogs football team training and practice sessions.

name: Frank W. Thomas Building
description: Academic building named for Frank W. Thomas housing university departments with classrooms and offices.

name: Graduate Lab
description: Graduate research lab providing workspace and resources for graduate students and research programs.

name: Greenhouses
description: Campus greenhouse facilities supporting plant science, horticulture, and agricultural research programs.

name: Herbarium / Ag Units
description: Campus herbarium and associated agricultural units supporting botanical research and plant science programs.

name: Homan Hall
description: Academic hall providing classrooms and faculty offices for university programs.

name: Horse Unit / Horse Center
description: Campus horse unit and student horse center providing equine facilities for animal science and equestrian programs.

name: Industrial Technology
description: Building housing industrial technology programs with workshops, labs, and classrooms for applied technology instruction.

name: Jordan Agricultural Research Center
description: Agricultural research center named for Jordan supporting applied agricultural science and food systems research.

name: Joyal Administration Building
description: Main administrative building named for Joyal housing university president's office and central administration.

name: Judging Pavilion
description: Livestock judging pavilion supporting animal science competitions, judging instruction, and agricultural events.

name: Henry Madden Library
description: Main campus library providing research resources, study spaces, digital collections, and academic support services.

name: Lynda and Stewart Resnick Student Union
aliases: Lynda and Stewart Resnick Student Union
description: Student union named for Lynda and Stewart Resnick providing dining, student government, event spaces, and campus life services.

name: McLane Hall
description: Academic hall providing classrooms and faculty offices for university programs.

name: McLane Hall Annex
description: Annex to McLane Hall providing additional classroom and office space for university programs.

name: Maple Mall
description: Central campus mall and core area featuring tree-lined walkways, gathering spaces, and landmark campus buildings.

name: Music Building
description: Building housing the music department with rehearsal spaces, practice rooms, faculty offices, and performance venues.

name: North Gym
description: North gymnasium providing sports courts, recreation, and physical education instructional spaces.

name: O'Neill Park
description: Campus park named for O'Neill providing open green space for student relaxation and outdoor activities.

name: Ornamental Horticulture Unit
description: Campus unit dedicated to ornamental horticulture instruction with gardens and plant production facilities.

name: Physical Therapy / Sports Medicine
description: Facility providing physical therapy and sports medicine services with clinical training spaces for health science students.

name: Police & Parking Services
description: University police and parking services facility providing law enforcement and campus parking administration.

name: Post Harvest Lab
description: Research laboratory focused on postharvest food science, storage, and processing technology for agricultural products.

name: Print, Mail & Warehouse
description: Campus facility providing printing, mail, and warehouse services for university departments and operations.

name: Recreation Fields / Playfields
description: Campus recreation and playfields supporting intramural sports, club sports, and informal recreation for students.

name: Rodeo Grounds
description: Campus rodeo grounds hosting intercollegiate rodeo events and agricultural competition for the rodeo team.

name: Rose Garden
description: Campus rose garden providing a scenic natural landscape with a variety of rose species for students and visitors.

name: San Ramon Avenue Facilities
description: Facilities located along San Ramon Avenue on the Fresno State campus perimeter.

name: Satellite Student Union
description: Secondary student union location providing services, dining, and gathering space away from the main student union.

name: Sheep Unit
description: Farm unit housing sheep for animal science instruction, livestock judging, and agricultural research.

name: Smittcamp Alumni House
description: Alumni house named for Smittcamp hosting alumni events, reunions, and university advancement activities.

name: Social Science Building
description: Building housing social science departments including sociology, political science, and related disciplines.

name: South Gym
description: South gymnasium facility providing sports courts, recreation, and instructional spaces for physical education.

name: Speech Arts Building
description: Building housing communication, speech, and performing arts programs with classrooms and rehearsal spaces.

name: Spalding G. Wathen Tennis Complex
description: Tennis complex named for Spalding G. Wathen hosting Fresno State Bulldogs tennis matches and campus recreation.

name: Student Recreation Center
description: Campus recreation center with fitness equipment, courts, pools, and wellness programs for students.

name: Student Services Building
description: Building housing student services including advising, financial aid, registrar, and enrollment support.

name: The Fountain
description: Iconic campus fountain serving as a central landmark and gathering point on the Fresno State campus.

name: Warmerdam Field / Track & Field
description: Track and field facility named for Warmerdam hosting Fresno State Bulldogs track and field and cross country programs.

name: University Business Center
description: University business center supporting administrative operations, business services, and auxiliary functions.

name: University Dining Hall
description: Main campus dining hall providing a variety of meals for students, faculty, and staff.

name: University High School
description: Laboratory high school on the Fresno State campus serving as a K-12 partner and teacher preparation site.

name: University Student Union
description: Central student union hub providing student government, clubs, event spaces, and campus life services.

name: Veterans Memorial
description: Campus memorial honoring veterans and military service members from the Fresno State community.

name: Veterinary Unit
description: Campus veterinary unit providing animal health services and supporting veterinary science instruction.

name: Vincent E. Petrucci Viticulture Building
description: Viticulture building named for Vincent E. Petrucci supporting viticulture and enology programs with vineyards and labs.

name: Water Tower
